# Praman Consulting — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> Praman Consulting is a full-service management consulting firm operating at pramanconsulting.com, offering a broad suite of professional services including strategic consulting, marketing design, sales enablement, and HR consulting. The brand tone is sharp, direct, and human — blending authoritative expertise with an approachable, people-first voice. The firm positions itself as a results-driven partner that cuts through corporate noise and delivers real impact across business functions.

---

## Pages

### Home
https://example.com
Praman Consulting is the global management consulting firm that delivers sharp strategy, real results, and zero fluff. Partner with us to transform your business from the inside out.

### Services
https://example.com/services
From strategy to execution, our business management consulting services cover marketing design, sales enablement, and HR consulting. Stop planning, start performing.

### Approach
https://example.com/approach
Our approach cuts through corporate clutter with a people-first, data-sharp methodology. Discover how this business management consulting firm turns insight into action.

### About
https://example.com/about
We&#39;re a global management consulting firm built on sharp minds and real talk. Meet the team that brings McKinsey-level rigor without the robot act.

### Contact
https://example.com/contact
Stop scrolling and start solving. Reach out to the business management consulting firm that answers fast, listens first, and delivers without the drama.

### Thank You | Praman Consulting
https://example.com/thank-you
Praman Consulting - Thank You | Praman Consulting

## How to Contact Us

- (No contact details configured yet.)

### Contact form
- URL: https://example.com/contact
- Endpoint: https://example.com/api/email/contact-form
- Method: POST
- Content-Type: application/json
- Fields:
  - `name` (text, required)
  - `email` (email, required)
  - `phone` (tel)
  - `message` (textarea, required)
  - `privacy_consent` (checkbox)

---

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About Praman Consulting
Praman Consulting is a full-service management consulting firm operating at pramanconsulting.com, offering a broad suite of professional services including strategic consulting, marketing design, sales enablement, and HR consulting. The brand tone is sharp, direct, and human — blending authoritative expertise with an approachable, people-first voice. The firm positions itself as a results-driven partner that cuts through corporate noise and delivers real impact across business functions.

## Target Audience
- Corporate Leaders
- Mid-size Business Owners
- Emerging Tech Startups

## Industry
Management Consulting

- Robots: https://example.com/robots.txt
